summary: Iteration 7: Faculty & Staff Module - All backend tests passed (20/20), frontend fully functional. Faculty CRUD, departments, subjects, classrooms, and schedules all working correctly. UI displays stats cards, directory list, detail view with schedule, and manage tab with inline forms.
critical_code_review_comments: Faculty module properly implements team-based filtering via _team_filter()
Admin role check via _require_admin() for write operations
Schedule entries properly linked to faculty_id with cascade delete
Master schedule enriches entries with faculty_name lookup
Frontend FacultyStaff.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
All API endpoints properly handle authentication and authorization

faculty_crud.list_faculty: GET /api/faculty/ returns faculty list sorted by last_name ✓
faculty_crud.create_faculty: POST /api/faculty/ creates new faculty with full_name auto-generated ✓
faculty_crud.update_faculty: PATCH /api/faculty/member/{id} updates faculty and recalculates full_name ✓
faculty_crud.delete_faculty: DELETE /api/faculty/member/{id} removes faculty and their schedules ✓

faculty_stats.get_stats: GET /api/faculty/stats returns total_faculty, active_faculty, on_leave, departments, subjects, classrooms, schedule_entries ✓

departments_crud.list_departments: GET /api/faculty/departments returns departments sorted by name ✓
departments_crud.create_department: POST /api/faculty/departments creates department with name, head_name, description ✓

subjects_crud.list_subjects: GET /api/faculty/subjects returns subjects sorted by name ✓
subjects_crud.create_subject: POST /api/faculty/subjects creates subject with name, code, department, grade_levels, credit_hours ✓

classrooms_crud.list_classrooms: GET /api/faculty/classrooms returns classrooms sorted by room_number ✓
classrooms_crud.create_classroom: POST /api/faculty/classrooms creates classroom with room_number, building, capacity, room_type, equipment ✓

faculty_schedule.list_schedule: GET /api/faculty/member/{id}/schedule returns schedule entries sorted by day_of_week, period ✓
faculty_schedule.add_schedule: POST /api/faculty/member/{id}/schedule adds schedule entry with subject_name, classroom, period, day_of_week, times ✓

master_schedule.get_all: GET /api/faculty/schedule/all returns all schedule entries enriched with faculty_name ✓

frontend_faculty_staff.stats_cards: Stats cards show Faculty, Active, Departments, Subjects, Classrooms counts ✓
frontend_faculty_staff.directory_tab: Directory tab shows faculty list with search and filter ✓
frontend_faculty_staff.faculty_row_click: Clicking faculty row opens detail view ✓
frontend_faculty_staff.detail_view: Detail view shows Contact & Info, Subjects, Schedule Summary, Class Schedule ✓
frontend_faculty_staff.add_schedule_btn: Add Class button opens schedule form ✓
frontend_faculty_staff.back_button: Back button returns to faculty list ✓
frontend_faculty_staff.manage_tab: Manage tab shows Departments, Subjects, Classrooms sections ✓
frontend_faculty_staff.inline_forms: Inline add forms for departments, subjects, classrooms work ✓
frontend_faculty_staff.add_faculty_dialog: Dialog shows all form fields (name, email, position, department, status, etc.) ✓

seed_data_verified.faculty: Sarah Johnson (EMP001, Mathematics dept, Teacher) with Algebra I, Geometry subjects
seed_data_verified.subject: Algebra I (MATH101, Mathematics dept)
seed_data_verified.schedule: Sarah Johnson teaches Algebra I on Monday P1 (08:00-08:50) in Room 101, Grade 9

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7: Faculty & Staff module fully implemented and tested. Backend has faculty.py router with CRUD for faculty, departments, subjects, classrooms, and schedules. Frontend FacultyStaff.jsx has Directory tab (list/search/filter), Manage tab (inline forms), and Detail view (schedule grid). Test data: Sarah Johnson exists with one schedule entry. All TEST_ prefixed data was cleaned up after testing.
